NET_PROFIT.title: Net Profit
NET_PROFIT.description: Final result after all expenses and taxes. What really stays in your pocket.

NET_MARGIN.title: Net Margin
NET_MARGIN.description: Percentage of profit over total revenue. Financial health indicator.

CONTRIB_MARGIN.title: Contribution Margin
CONTRIB_MARGIN.description: What remains from sales to pay fixed costs. Pricing power.

FIXED_COSTS.title: Fixed Costs
FIXED_COSTS.description: Total expenses that don't vary with sales. Operational structure.

BREAK_EVEN.title: Break-Even Point
BREAK_EVEN.description: Revenue needed to avoid losses. Minimum survival target.

CASH_FLOW.title: Cash Flow
CASH_FLOW.description: Available balance of inflows and outflows. Immediate availability.

ACCOUNTS_RECEIVABLE.title: Accounts Receivable
ACCOUNTS_RECEIVABLE.description: Total pending payments from customers. Money to come in.

AVG_COLLECTION_PERIOD.title: Average Collection Period
AVG_COLLECTION_PERIOD.description: Average time to receive payments. Financial cycle.

SALES_CONVERSION.title: Sales Conversion Rate
SALES_CONVERSION.description: Percentage of quotes that became sales. Commercial efficiency.

AVG_TICKET.title: Average Ticket
AVG_TICKET.description: Average value of each sale. Business size.

CUSTOMER_ACQ_COST.title: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
CUSTOMER_ACQ_COST.description: Marketing investment to attract each customer. Acquisition efficiency.

CUSTOMER_LIFETIME_VALUE.title: Customer Lifetime Value (LTV)
CUSTOMER_LIFETIME_VALUE.description: Total customer spends while active. Relationship value.

INVENTORY_TURNOVER.title: Inventory Turnover
INVENTORY_TURNOVER.description: How many times inventory was renewed. Sales velocity.

EMPLOYEE_TURNOVER.title: Employee Turnover
EMPLOYEE_TURNOVER.description: Percentage of employees who left or were replaced. Organizational stability.

RECEIVABLES_DAYS.title: Collection Period
RECEIVABLES_DAYS.description: Average time to collect from customers. Cash inflow cycle.

PAYABLES_DAYS.title: Payment Period
PAYABLES_DAYS.description: Average time to pay suppliers. Cash outflow cycle.

SALES_PIPELINE.title: Sales Pipeline
SALES_PIPELINE.description: Total value of deals under negotiation. Opportunity pipeline.

ROAS.title: Return on Ad Spend
ROAS.description: How many times ad investment returned in sales. Investment efficiency.

REVENUE_PER_EMP.title: Revenue per Employee
REVENUE_PER_EMP.description: Total revenue divided by number of employees. Individual productivity.

LABOR_COST_PCT.title: Payroll Burden
LABOR_COST_PCT.description: How much payroll consumes of revenue. Structural weight.

REWORK_RATE.title: Rework Rate
REWORK_RATE.description: Percentage of services/products needing correction. Operational quality.

ORDER_CYCLE.title: Order Cycle Time
ORDER_CYCLE.description: Total time from order to final delivery. Operational velocity.

CAPACITY_USE.title: Capacity Utilization
CAPACITY_USE.description: How much of your structure or team time is being used. Optimization.

DEAD_STOCK.title: Dead Stock
DEAD_STOCK.description: Value in products without sales for over 90 days. Immobilized capital.

NPS.title: Net Promoter Score
NPS.description: Customer loyalty and recommendation score. Promoter index.

REPURCHASE.title: Repurchase Rate
REPURCHASE.description: Percentage of customers who bought again. Retention and loyalty.

LOW_PROFITABILITY.title: Low Profitability
LOW_PROFITABILITY.short_description: Company bills but final profit is insufficient
LOW_PROFITABILITY.full_description: Company bills but final profit is insufficient. Compressed margins and difficulty reinvesting.

CASH_SHORTAGE.title: Cash Shortage
CASH_SHORTAGE.short_description: Difficulty paying month bills on time
CASH_SHORTAGE.full_description: Difficulty paying month bills on time. Unfavorable financial cycle.

HIGH_FIXED_COSTS.title: High Fixed Costs
HIGH_FIXED_COSTS.full_description: Company structure consumes too much revenue. Little operational flexibility.

LATE_RECEIVABLES.title: Late Receivables
LATE_RECEIVABLES.full_description: Long collection period or delinquency. Working capital compromised.

CUSTOMER_LOSS.title: Customer Loss
CUSTOMER_LOSS.full_description: High cancellation or non-return rate. Low loyalty.

LOW_SALES_CONVERSION.title: Low Sales Conversion
LOW_SALES_CONVERSION.full_description: Many quotes sent, few closed. Commercial inefficiency.

HIGH_ACQUISITION_COST.title: High Acquisition Cost
HIGH_ACQUISITION_COST.short_description: Cost to attract customer exceeds profit
HIGH_ACQUISITION_COST.full_description: Cost to attract customer exceeds profit. Inefficient marketing.

STOCK_STAGNATION.title: Stock Stagnation
STOCK_STAGNATION.full_description: Money tied in non-moving products. Capital locked.

DELIVERY_DELAY.title: Delivery Delay
DELIVERY_DELAY.short_description: Slow product delivery or service execution
DELIVERY_DELAY.full_description: Slow delivery of products or execution of services. Customers dissatisfied with deadlines and competitiveness affected.

symptoms.idle_capacity: Idle capacity while orders are delayed

INCREASE_PROFIT.title: Increase Profit
INCREASE_PROFIT.description: Raise net profit percentage over revenue. Focus on final margin.
INCREASE_PROFIT.success_criteria: Increase NET_MARGIN by at least 5 percentage points for 3 consecutive months.

BALANCE_CASH_FLOW.title: Balance Cash Flow
BALANCE_CASH_FLOW.description: Ensure inflows exceed outflows monthly. Eliminate negative balance.
BALANCE_CASH_FLOW.success_criteria: Maintain positive CASH_FLOW for 3 consecutive months with 20% safety margin.

REDUCE_EXPENSES.title: Reduce Fixed Expenses
REDUCE_EXPENSES.description: Optimize operational costs without losing quality. Structural efficiency.
REDUCE_EXPENSES.success_criteria: Reduce FIXED_COSTS by 10-15% without impacting critical operations.

ACCELERATE_RECEIPTS.title: Accelerate Receivables
ACCELERATE_RECEIPTS.description: Reduce average time between sale and cash. Optimized financial cycle.
ACCELERATE_RECEIPTS.success_criteria: Reduce AVG_COLLECTION_PERIOD to less than 30 days.

IMPROVE_CONVERSION.title: Improve Sales Conversion
IMPROVE_CONVERSION.description: Increase commercial team effectiveness in closings. Sales efficiency.

RETAIN_CUSTOMERS.title: Retain Customers
RETAIN_CUSTOMERS.description: Increase recurrence and customer lifetime. Loyalty.
RETAIN_CUSTOMERS.success_criteria: Reduce EMPLOYEE_TURNOVER to less than 10% monthly and increase LTV.

OPTIMIZE_STOCK.title: Optimize Stock
OPTIMIZE_STOCK.description: Adjust inventory to avoid shortages and excess. Working capital freed.
OPTIMIZE_STOCK.success_criteria: Increase INVENTORY_TURNOVER to at least 6x per year.

FAST_OPERATION.title: Fast Operation
FAST_OPERATION.description: Reduce delivery time and increase capacity utilization. Operational efficiency.
FAST_OPERATION.success_criteria: Reduce ORDER_CYCLE by 30% and maintain CAPACITY_USE above 75% for 3 months.

review_pricing.title: Review pricing of main products
review_pricing.description: Analyze contribution margin of top 20% products generating 80% revenue and adjust prices.

negotiate_suppliers.title: Renegotiate payment terms with suppliers
negotiate_suppliers.description: Extend terms from 30 to 45-60 days with main suppliers.

reduce_fixed_costs.title: Review rent and service contracts
reduce_fixed_costs.description: Renegotiate rent, internet, phone, accounting to reduce 10%.

accelerate_collection.title: Require upfront or cash payment
accelerate_collection.description: Offer 5% discount for cash payment at closing.

implement_loyalty.title: Implement loyalty program
implement_loyalty.description: Create points or progressive discount system for repeat purchases.

train_sales.title: Train team in closing techniques
train_sales.description: Train salespeople in negotiation and objection handling techniques.

referral_program.title: Focus on referral marketing
referral_program.description: Create referral reward program for current customers.

optimize_inventory.title: Implement just-in-time with suppliers
optimize_inventory.description: Negotiate more frequent deliveries in smaller quantities.

map_bottlenecks.title: Map and eliminate process bottlenecks
map_bottlenecks.description: Analyze workflow and identify waiting points/time waste.

prioritize_orders.title: Implement order prioritization system
prioritize_orders.description: Create queues by urgency/complexity to optimize work sequence.

standardize_procedures.title: Standardize operational procedures
standardize_procedures.description: Create checklists and SOPs to reduce variation and rework.
standardize_procedures.impact: Reduces REWORK_RATE and speeds up delivery

ACT_AUDIT_MARGIN.title: Item Margin Audit
ACT_AUDIT_MARGIN.description: List all products/services, calculate real margin for each, and identify 'loss leaders' hurting profitability.

ACT_CUT_GHOST_SUBSCRIPTIONS.title: Cut 'Ghost Subscriptions'
ACT_CUT_GHOST_SUBSCRIPTIONS.description: Review bank statements and cancel unused software, services and subscriptions.

ACT_CASH_PAYMENT_INCENTIVE.title: Cash Payment Incentive
ACT_CASH_PAYMENT_INCENTIVE.description: Create aggressive discount policy for early payment and reduce long installment options.

ACT_DEBT_SWAP.title: Swap Expensive Debt for Cheap
ACT_DEBT_SWAP.description: Pay off high-cost debt (overdraft, credit card) with cheaper credit lines or working capital.

ACT_OBJECTION_SCRIPT.title: Objection Handling Script
ACT_OBJECTION_SCRIPT.description: Train salespeople to focus on 'Value delivered' instead of 'Low price' when customers resist.

ACT_CROSS_SELL_OFFER.title: Complementary Offer (Cross-sell)
ACT_CROSS_SELL_OFFER.description: Offer additional product/service at the moment of closing the main sale.

ACT_MARKETING_AUDIT.title: Marketing Channels Audit
ACT_MARKETING_AUDIT.description: Immediately turn off acquisition channels not generating return (ROAS < 2).

ACT_REWORK_MAP.title: Rework Mapping
ACT_REWORK_MAP.description: Identify where process stalls and errors that force redoing service or product.

ACT_DEAD_STOCK_LIQUIDATION.title: Dead Stock Liquidation
ACT_DEAD_STOCK_LIQUIDATION.description: Run aggressive promotion to turn old inventory (> 90 days) into cash.

ACT_INDIVIDUAL_TARGETS.title: Individual Target Setting
ACT_INDIVIDUAL_TARGETS.description: Make clear to each employee what their weekly delivery indicator is.

ACT_REACTIVATION_CAMPAIGN.title: Reactivation Campaign
ACT_REACTIVATION_CAMPAIGN.description: Contact customers not buying for 60+ days with special return offer.

ACT_LOYALTY_PROGRAM.title: Simple Loyalty Program
ACT_LOYALTY_PROGRAM.description: Create points or cashback system to encourage repeat purchases.

LEV_PRICE.title: Pricing Review
LEV_PRICE.description: Adjust prices to optimize contribution margin. Involves cost analysis, competition and elasticity.

LEV_FIXED_COST.title: Fixed Cost Optimization
LEV_FIXED_COST.description: Reduce operating costs without affecting quality. Focus on eliminating waste and renegotiating contracts.

LEV_CASH_CYCLE.title: Cash Cycle Acceleration
LEV_CASH_CYCLE.description: Reduce time between sale and collection. Accelerate conversion of sales into available cash.

LEV_DEBT_RECON.title: Debt Restructuring
LEV_DEBT_RECON.description: Restructure expensive debt into cheaper credit lines or working capital.

LEV_CONVERSION.title: Sales Efficiency
LEV_CONVERSION.description: Improve quote-to-sale conversion rate through sales techniques and follow-up.

LEV_UPSELL.title: Average Ticket Increase
LEV_UPSELL.description: Increase average sale value through cross-sell, up-sell and product bundling.

LEV_ACQ_EFF.title: Marketing Budget Optimization
LEV_ACQ_EFF.description: Improve marketing investment efficiency to reduce customer acquisition cost.

LEV_WASTE.title: Waste Combat
LEV_WASTE.description: Eliminate rework, material waste and inefficiencies in production process.

LEV_STOCK_TURN.title: Asset Turnover (Inventory)
LEV_STOCK_TURN.description: Accelerate inventory rotation to free up working capital and reduce obsolescence.

LEV_TEAM_PROD.title: Team Productivity
LEV_TEAM_PROD.description: Increase output per employee through clear goals, training and bottleneck elimination.

LEV_RETENTION.title: Customer Base Protection
LEV_RETENTION.description: Reduce churn and increase purchase recurrence through loyalty and reactivation programs.
